name: hitmontop
flavor_texts: If you become enchanted by its smooth, elegant, dance-like kicks, you may get drilled hard.
It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground.
After doing a handstand to throw off the opponent's timing, it presents its fancy kick moves.

HITMONTOP spins on its head at high speed, all the while delivering kicks. This technique is a remarkable mix of both offense and defense at the same time. The POKéMON travels faster spinning than it does walking.
Its technique of kicking while spinning is a remarkable mix of both offense and defense. HITMONTOP travel faster spinning than they do walking.
It fights while spinning like a top. The centrifugal force boosts its destructive power by ten.
If you are enchanted by its smooth, dance-like kicks, you may get a closer experience with one than you’d like.
It fights while spinning like a top. The centrifugal force boosts its destructive power by 10.

text: Hitmontop is the Handstand Pokémon. It is a fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: intimidate, technician, steadfast (hidden). Base stats — HP: 50, Attack: 95, Defense: 95, Sp. Atk: 35, Sp. Def: 110, Speed: 70. Evolution line: tyrogue → hitmonlee → hitmonchan → hitmontop. Lore: If you become enchanted by its smooth, elegant, dance-like kicks, you may get drilled hard. It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground. After doing a handstand to throw off the opponent's timing, it presents its fancy kick moves. HITMONTOP spins on its head at high speed, all the while delivering kicks. This technique is a remarkable mix of both offense and defense at the same time. The POKéMON travels faster spinning than it does walking. Its technique of kicking while spinning is a remarkable mix of both offense and defense. HITMONTOP travel faster spinning than they do walking.
